exploration_notes: The CSS layout reflow pipeline in Gecko spans three core subsystems: (1) Frame construction: nsCSSFrameConstructor.cpp builds the frame tree from DOM nodes via ContentInserted/ContentRemoved. (2) Block layout reflow: nsBlockFrame.cpp is the central file implementing Reflow(), ReflowDirtyLines(), ReflowBlockFrame(), and DoReflowInlineFrames(); it is supported by BlockReflowState.cpp (per-reflow state), nsBlockReflowContext.cpp (child block reflow context), nsLineLayout.cpp (inline-level reflow wi
